author: festivebreadke
description: We have come to the end of Season 2 of Feast With Friends. To our incredible host @shiksha.arora  thank you for the heart, the laughter, and the unforgettable moments you brought to every episode. You did not just host this season, you made it come alive. Asante sana for the passion, the energy, and the memories. You carried this season so beautifully, and it would not have been the same without you. You will always be part of the Feast With Friends family. Drop a comment below and help us say thank you for an amazing season ❤️

author: festivebreadke
description: Something exciting is baking at Festive… and she’s bringing good food, vibes, stories, and unstoppable energy! Guess who’s pulling up to the table in the second season? It’s bold. It’s fresh. It’s all about @shiksha.arora. #FeastWithFriends just got a whole new vibe, and it’s about to get real fun. #NewHostAlert #ShikshaArora #FeastWithFriends #FoodAndVibes #Season2 #fyp
